description_long: This is a large, military-grade combat tactical vehicle equipped with a multi-tube missile launcher system mounted on its rear chassis. The vehicle features a heavily armored cab with angular surfaces and a small roof-mounted weapon, likely for defensive purposes. It has six large, rugged tires designed for off-road and urban mobility, with visible stabilizing outriggers deployed for firing stability. The missile launcher pod is elevated and angled, revealing multiple launch tubes. The exterior is finished in a matte, dark green paint with a subtle camouflage pattern, and the vehicle lacks any visible military insignia or numbers. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and mobility for urban or battlefield deployment.
description: A large, armored military vehicle with a raised multi-tube missile launcher and six rugged tires, finished in matte green camouflage. It features a reinforced cab and stabilizing outriggers for firing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the armored cab, roof-mounted weapon, and the open missile launcher pod with visible launch tubes.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the vehicle, the elevated missile launcher, six large tires, and deployed outriggers.
description_view_2: Rear view focuses on the back of the missile launcher pod, showing the launch tubes and stabilizing outriggers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the vehicle's profile, missile launcher elevation, and rugged tire arrangement.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large multi-tube missile launcher on the rear chassis and a small roof-mounted weapon on the cab.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body visible armor plating with angular, sloped surfaces; appears thick and reinforced, especially around the cab.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Matte dark green with subtle, irregular camouflage patches.
attribute_tire_type: Six large off-road tires with deep tread pattern, designed for heavy-duty and all-terrain use.
